title: WeCP AI Copilot | Revolutionize Recruiting & Upskilling with Advanced AI Technology

## Don't have enough relevant questions in the bank? Put AI to work.

### Your ultra-capable subject matter expert

Questions a bottleneck? Have WeCP AI Copilot generate a wide range of relevant assessment questions aligned to your recruiting and upskilling needs quickly and accurately. Customize, and ensure assessment content diversity at scale.

.png)

### Contextual

Excels in understanding context, delivering tailored assessments that accurately reflect real-world scenarios your business face daily

### Ethical

Adheres to ethical guidelines, ensuring unbiased, fair assessments with respect for user privacy.

### Secure

Ensures top-tier security, safeguarding data with advanced encryption and rigorous compliance standards for utmost confidentiality.

## The magic of AI is not just speed, but its precision in aligning talent with your business 🚀

### Align talent with business goals, propel competitive advantage

Assess talent while aligning to business. Do not neglect soft-skills, and future potential.

#### Question Generation

WeCP AI Copilot can generate a vast number of relevant assessment questions quickly. It uses AI algorithms to create questions tailored to specific skills, competencies, or knowledge areas required for a particular job role or upskilling program.

#### Content Diversity

The AI Copilot can ensure diversity in question types, covering a wide range of topics and difficulty levels, making assessments more comprehensive and effective.

#### Scalability

As the need for assessments or upskilling grows, WeCP AI Copilot can scale up question generation, ensuring a consistent supply of relevant questions for a large number of candidates or learners.

#### Quality Assurance

The AI Copilot can also perform quality assurance by evaluating the validity, clarity, and fairness of generated questions, ensuring that they accurately assess candidates or learners.

#### Auto Evaluation

After designing a question, test cases, and code stubs, the next step where candidates can actually code and run their solutions. This ensures that the question is not just designed but is also evaluation-ready.

.png)

#### Skill Analysis

If you have specific queries about a candidate's skills that may not be fully captured in the report, Copilot can analyze the detailed report and provide answers.

## "Through AI, we gain a deeper understanding of soft skills, transforming them from intangible assets to measurable competencies." - Satya Nadella, CEO of Microsoft

### Assess Soft skills with ethical, compliant AI

Embracing AI in soft skills assessment is not about devaluing human interaction, but about enhancing our understanding of human complexities 

"It’s going to change my work forever. What an amazing value! Not just that it crafts the question statement, it automates the entire testing"

**Shlomi Vaknin**

Tech Lead, DevRev

## Try WeCP AI Copilot for free

Tap into the power of AI right inside WeCP, today.

Get Started

## FAQs about WeCP AI Copilot

What exactly is WeCP AI Copilot

WeCP AI Copilot is an artificial intelligence system designed to assist in the recruiting and upskilling processes. It incorporates a combination of GPT-powered models and WeCP's proprietary AI technology, aiming to make the evaluation and hiring of candidates as accurate, productive, and seamless as possible​​​​. WeCP AI Copilot can handle a variety of human-like tasks, such as designing relevant and up-to-date assessment questions, analyse candidate performance, and several other tasks to better screen candidate skills​​. This system is highlighted as both ethical and responsible, focusing on enhancing the quality and efficiency of talent acquisition​​​​.

What all can WeCP AI Copilot do?

You can read more about its capabilities here

How to start using WeCP AI Copilot?

WeCP AI Copilot is available in all the plans except the plan "Screen Candidate's Skills". To get started, onboard yourself with WeCP and simply upgrade to the "Improve Quality of Hire" or the higher plans.

How does WeCP AI Copilot use my data?

Our user's data and their protection is our top priority. We follow our standard data security and privacy policy to keep your data encrypted and private. Moreover, the WeCP AI Copilot will not use your data to train our models.

What's the pricing for using WeCP AI Copilot?

It starts at $199/mo as part of "Improve Quality of Hire" plan
